title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!
